[fn] aria-label sets accessibilityLabel on the container
[fn] all children render as tab items
[fn] controlled value marks the matching tab as selected
[fn] pressing a tab fires onValueChange with its value
[fn] pressing a different tab updates selection (uncontrolled)
[fn] only one tab is selected at a time (mutual exclusivity)
[fn] controlled mode: pressing tab calls onValueChange but does not self-update
[fn] labelType="none" hides all labels across items
[fn] default labelType is "1line" — labels visible by default
[a11y] aria-label required — provides accessible name for nav landmark
[bug] BUG-BN-1: Figma "label=1Line" maps to native labelType="1line" — naming mismatch
[bug] BUG-BN-2: omitting aria-label emits console.warn (no accessible landmark name)
[bug] BUG-BN-3: 6 items (>MAX_ITEMS=5) emits console.warn but still renders all 6
